title: 舜天信兴样衣管理系统场景化讲解动画
titleEn: Suntien Xinxing Sample Management System Scenario Tour

scenes.zh: 客户在会议现场提出方向：想看欧洲市场、轻户外、浅色系，并拿出一张参考图。业务员不用回去问设计部，直接从业务前台开始找款。
scenes.en: In a client meeting, the buyer asks for European-market, light outdoor, pale-color styles and shows a reference image. The salesperson starts from the Sales Desk instead of going back to ask Design.

actions.labelZh: 客户提出风格、市场和参考图
actions.labelEn: Client gives style, market, and reference image

actions.labelZh: 业务员打开业务前台准备找款
actions.labelEn: Sales opens the Sales Desk to start sourcing

scenes.titleEn: Sales signs in to the desk
scenes.zh: 业务员用姓名、业务组和手机号进入前台。系统会把后续收藏、已选、PPT、借样申请和费用账单都归到这个业务员和业务组。
scenes.en: The salesperson signs in with name, team, and phone number. Favorites, selections, PPT records, loan requests, and bills are then tied to that person and business team.

actions.labelZh: 填写业务员和业务组信息
actions.labelEn: Fill salesperson and business team details

actions.labelZh: 进入可给客户看的前台页面
actions.labelEn: Enter the client-facing Sales Desk

scenes.zh: 业务员按客户需求在瀑布流里看款：先切换设计样衣和大货样品，再筛在库、季节、品类、颜色，让客户快速看到可借可推的款。
scenes.en: The salesperson browses in a waterfall layout based on the client brief: switch design and bulk samples, then filter available items, season, category, and color.

actions.labelZh: 切换设计样衣和大货样品
actions.labelEn: Switch design samples and bulk samples

actions.labelZh: 瀑布流浏览客户可能喜欢的款
actions.labelEn: Scroll styles the client may like

scenes.zh: 客户给了一张参考图，业务员点击搜索栏右侧相机，上传图片。系统在当前可见样衣里找相似款，优先给出同品类、同风格的候选。
scenes.en: When the client provides a reference image, the salesperson clicks the camera beside search and uploads it. The system searches visible samples and ranks similar styles first.

actions.labelZh: 点击相机图标上传参考图
actions.labelEn: Click the camera icon to upload a reference

actions.labelZh: 查看相似度最高的候选款
actions.labelEn: Review the highest similarity matches

scenes.titleEn: Favorite and build a pitch list
scenes.zh: 客户觉得不错的款，业务员点爱心收藏；本次要推给客户的款，再勾选加入已选清单。收藏代表长期关注，已选代表本次推款。
scenes.en: For styles the client likes, the salesperson taps the heart to favorite. For styles to pitch now, they check them into the selected list. Favorites are long-term; selected items are for this pitch.

actions.labelZh: 点爱心收藏客户感兴趣的款
actions.labelEn: Tap heart to favorite client-interest styles

actions.labelZh: 勾选加入本次客户推款清单
actions.labelEn: Check items into this client's pitch list

scenes.zh: 业务员点开款式详情，给客户看正面、背面白底图，同时确认吊牌价、借样费、尺码、库位和架杆。下面的近似款帮助现场继续扩展选择。
scenes.en: The salesperson opens details to show front and back white-background images, then checks price, loan fee, size, storage location, and rack. Similar styles below expand the selection.

actions.labelZh: 打开详情查看正背面图
actions.labelEn: Open details to view front and back images

actions.labelZh: 确认借样费、库位和近似款
actions.labelEn: Confirm loan fee, location, and similar styles

scenes.titleZh: 一键生成客户推款 PPT
scenes.zh: 业务员选好一组款后，点击右上角推款 PPT。系统自动生成客户可看的推款文件，并在我的中心留下 PPT 记录，方便复盘和继续沟通。
scenes.en: After selecting a group of styles, the salesperson clicks Pitch PPT. The system creates a client-ready presentation and stores the PPT record in My Center for follow-up.

actions.labelZh: 点击推款 PPT
actions.labelEn: Click Pitch PPT

actions.labelZh: 查看我的 PPT 记录
actions.labelEn: Review PPT records in My Center

scenes.zh: 客户确认想看实物后，业务员在详情页填写用途、预计归还时间和备注，提交借样申请。申请会进入设计部后台待处理。
scenes.en: When the client wants physical samples, the salesperson fills purpose, expected return date, and notes on the detail page, then submits a loan request to Design Admin.

actions.labelZh: 填写用途和预计归还时间
actions.labelEn: Fill purpose and expected return date

actions.labelZh: 提交借样申请
actions.labelEn: Submit the loan request

scenes.zh: 样衣管理员在后台看到待处理申请，按库位和架杆找到样衣，确认借出。归还时恢复在库；丢失、损坏或自然淘汰时走报损。
scenes.en: The sample administrator sees pending requests in the back office, finds items by location and rack, and confirms the loan. Returns restore availability; lost, damaged, or retired items go to loss reports.

actions.labelZh: 后台打开待处理借样申请
actions.labelEn: Open pending loan requests in admin

actions.labelZh: 按库位架杆确认借出或报损
actions.labelEn: Confirm loan or loss by location and rack

scenes.zh: 设计师上传正面和背面图，使用 AI 生成统一白底图和补全字段，再填写吊牌价、借样费、库位和架杆。新款入库后前台马上可见。
scenes.en: The designer uploads front and back images, uses AI to create consistent white-background images and complete fields, then enters price, loan fee, location, and rack. The new style becomes visible to sales.

actions.labelZh: 上传正背面图片
actions.labelEn: Upload front and back images

actions.labelZh: AI 补全字段并选择库位架杆
actions.labelEn: Use AI completion and assign location

scenes.zh: 业务员可以问报价和汇率，设计师可以问趋势和款式方向，样衣管理员可以问在库样衣和库位。问问云知把 AI 放到每个角色的工作流里。
scenes.en: Sales can ask about quotes and exchange rates, designers can ask about trends and style directions, and sample admins can ask about inventory and locations. Yunzhi brings AI into each workflow.

actions.labelZh: 打开问问云知
actions.labelEn: Open Ask Yunzhi

actions.labelZh: 询问趋势、报价、汇率或在库样衣
actions.labelEn: Ask trends, quotes, exchange rates, or inventory

scenes.zh: 管理层按业务组拉取周、月、年账单，查看哪个客户、业务员和风格借用最多。第二年可以提前准备更贴近客户需求的样衣。
scenes.en: Management pulls weekly, monthly, and yearly bills by team, then checks which clients, salespeople, and style directions borrow most. Next season's sample preparation becomes demand-driven.

actions.labelZh: 按业务组拉取借样费用账单
actions.labelEn: Pull loan fee bills by business team

actions.labelZh: 分析客户偏好准备下一季样衣
actions.labelEn: Analyze client preferences for next-season samples
